particulars.description: All and whole the freehold property known as 4 golden yard, hollybush steps, hampstead, london NW3 6UH and registered at H.M. land registry under title number 232216.. all estates or interests in any real property (as defined in the instrument evidencing the charge accompanying this form MR01) now or hereafter..
